dj_text: That was Inden Det Er For Sent. Changing the channel. Just kidding, there's only one channel. Rune Rask Er For Syg. Down to the final track after this one.
commercial_text: You've been listening for a while now. Your family misses you. Just kidding, they're also listening.
recovery_text: Dimensional bleed. Happens sometimes. Never to US, but sometimes.
title: Rune Rask Er For Syg
